summary: Frontend-only QA of the I.AM.GIA-style redesign (PromoBar + new ProductCard + airy underlined tabs). Verified across EN/RU and desktop/mobile. All visual + behavioral requirements pass cleanly.
verified_checks: PromoBar fixed top-0 z-50 h-[34px] present on Home, Catalog, Product, Checkout, About — both EN and RU
PromoBar rotates messages every ~4.2s (verified text changed from 'FREE EXPRESS SHIPPING…' to 'SIGN UP — RECEIVE 10% OFF…')
SiteHeader positioned at y=34 directly below the 34px promo bar — no overlap
Home main has pt-[34px] and hero remains transparent / edge-to-edge
Inner pages (catalog, product, checkout, about) use pt-[102px] so content sits below promo+header
Catalog page renders new ProductCard layout: large image on white card, NEW badge top-left on first 2 cards, heart top-right, name & price BELOW image (name box y=1503 vs image bottom=1487)
Home ProductGrid uses new ProductCard layout with airy underlined tab (active 'ALL' shows underline)
Category tabs are airy underlined text links — no longer black/white boxes. Active tab has visible underline (scale-x-100), inactive use scale-x-0 + text-black/50
Quick-add button (data-testid=quick-add-{id}) adds to cart: bag count 0→(1) and CartDrawer opened
Wishlist heart toggle fills black (verified fill="#000" appears after click on RU catalog)
Clicking product name navigates to /ru/product/{id} successfully; product page renders with promo+header
Mobile (390px) — mobile-menu-btn opens NavOverlay with WOMEN/EDITORIAL/ARCHIVE/STORES/CONTACT items
header-bag testid present on mobile + desktop
i18n: PromoBar RU shows 'БЕСПЛАТНАЯ ДОСТАВКА…', NEW badge → 'НОВОЕ', quick-add → '+ В КОРЗИНУ'
Zero console errors on Home, Catalog (EN+RU), Product, Checkout pages
observations_non_blocking: Category endpoint currently returns only ['ALL'] — so the airy tab strip on Home and Catalog shows a single tab. The tab styling works as designed, but the visual benefit of multiple airy tabs cannot be appreciated until backend seeds more categories. Not in scope for this redesign iteration.

About page (/en/about) shows 6 console errors (3×401 + 2×404 + 1 Axios). These appear unrelated to the redesign task — likely pre-existing fetches in About content/admin endpoints. Recommend investigating in a separate iteration; they do NOT affect the redesign features.

Wishlist heart on first card after quick-add did not visually toggle because CartDrawer overlay was open at the time. After a fresh page load on /ru/catalog the toggle works (fill=#000 appears). No real bug.
critical_code_review_comments: PromoBar messages are hard-coded in component instead of i18n.js — minor; main agent may move them for consistency, but spec said keep simple.
Home page Shop section + Catalog page both have nearly identical 'airy underlined tabs' JSX — consider extracting a <CategoryTabs/> component (DRY).
ProductCard inline <style>{`@keyframes`}</style> is fine but could live in App.css with the other axum-ease utilities.
test_credentials: Not required for this UI-only redesign test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 focused on the I.AM.GIA aesthetic redesign — PromoBar mount across all pages, new ProductCard with image-on-white + NEW badge + heart + name/price below, airy underlined category tabs. Everything works on EN and RU, desktop and mobile (390px). Test IDs verified: promo-bar, site-header, product-card-{idx}, product-name-{idx}, product-price-{idx}, wishlist-{id}, quick-add-{id}, catalog-tabs/tab-ALL, catalog-tab-ALL, header-bag, bag-count, mobile-menu-btn, catalog-page, catalog-title-block, catalog-count, see-all-link, open-catalog-cta. About page has unrelated 401/404 console noise worth investigating in a future pass.
rca_of_the_issue: No issues found in scope. About-page console 401/404 errors are pre-existing and unrelated to redesign; main agent can investigate by inspecting AboutPage fetches separately if desired.
